message:
fix(freeze): fix TDZ opcodes to use locals[] instead of frame->locals[]

Root cause: TDZ opcodes (set_loc_uninitialized, put_loc_check, put_loc_check_init)
were accessing frame->locals[N] unconditionally. But in non-trampoline mode, the
frame struct only has a 'result' field - locals are declared as a local C array
variable instead.

Solution: Use locals[idx] which works in both modes:
- Non-trampoline: locals is the local JSValue locals[N] array
- Trampoline: locals is JSValue *locals = frame->locals pointer

This fixes many AOT SIGSEGV crashes but not all. Some tests still crash (e.g.
path.resolve) indicating there are other opcodes with similar frame access bugs.

Partial fix for: #SIGSEGV
Tests fixed: Buffer.alloc, path.join
Tests still failing: path.resolve, path.dirname, path.parse, etc.
